case_title: LA, HUNG HUY vs. BOLTZ, REED JASON et al

docket_entries.description: DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER TO DECLARE CASE AS "UNISURED MOTORIST" GRANTED BY JUDGE WICK FILED BY PLAINTIFF LA, HUNG HUY

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF MAR-08-1996, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT STATUS CONFERENCE ON MAR-08-1996, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), AS TO WHY PLAINTIFF FAILED TO PROVIDE THE COURT WITH AN UNINSURED MOTORIST REPORT. APPEARANCE WILL BE WAIVED CONDITIONAL UPON A DETAILED REPORT RE: STATUS OF CASE. HEARING SET FOR APR-08-1996 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LA, HUNG HUY AS TO DEFENDANT BOLTZ, REED JASON DOES 1 TO 25 SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          MAR-08-1996 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JAN-08-1996 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       FEB-20-1996
DECLARATION OF ROBERT Y.P. CHAN IN SUPPORT OF EX-P MOTION FILED BY PLAINTIFF LA, HUNG HUY
